conversation.statement: Yes? How can I help you?
I'm not sure if I can help, but sure.
Yes... not personally, but I think she's a doctor at the local pain management center.
The name doesn't ring a bell. She could be one of our customers, but I would have to check our database.
Of course. We are required by law to do so.
conversation.response: May I ask you some questions related to a case we're working on?
Do you know Dr. Jessica Phillips?
Do you warn your customers about drug interactions?

conversation.statement: I have already answered your questions. I have to go back to work now.
Money? I don't know what you're talking about.
A warrant? That's ridiculous. Well, if you insist, take the sample.
Of course, I keep a gun here for protection.
I guess I can't say no.
conversation.response: I'll make this quick. What was the money for that you received from the pain clinic?
I have a warrant for a DNA sample.
I'll have to ask you to hand it over.
